title: Waterproof Electrical Insulating Sealing Gel, 1000ml, 2-Part, IP68, Re-Enterable Gel, AquaSeal1000
features: IP68-rated gel seals and insulates electrical connections reliably
Re-enterable gel allows for easy maintenance and adjustments
Cures in 10 minutes, ensuring quick and efficient installation
Non-toxic, UV-stabilised and resistant to mould and moisture
description: Product Description Seal, Insulate & Protect – All in One From small-scale projects to heavy-duty applications, AquaSeal1000 delivers lasting insulation and sealing. Its easy mix-and-pour formula cures into a transparent, flexible gel—keeping your connections safe and operational, whatever the conditions. Seal Your Connections in Minutes 1 Pour the two-components into the beaker provided in a 1:1 ratio 2 Mix the solution for 15-30 seconds max. 3 Pour the mixed solution within 1 minute max. 4 In 10 minutes at 23°C the solution becomes a gel Protection against harsh weather Protection against dust and dirt Protection against humidity and electrical interference APPLICATIONS Electrical Enclosure & Junction Boxes - Seals and insulates electrical connections to prevent failures caused by moisture and dust. Outdoor & Submerged Installations - Protects wiring in irrigation systems, swimming pools, outdoor lighting, and underground enclosures. TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS Insulation Elevated Voltage (1kV operating, 4kV testing Degree of Protection IP68 in a suitable enclosure Cross-Linking Time Approx. 10 minutes at 23⁰C Volume Resistivity >2 × 10¹⁵ Ω cm Working Temperature -60°C to +200°C Overload Temperature Up to 250°C Stabilised for Mould & UV Resistance Gel Classification UL 94-HB
